document.title: TEST REPORT
document.revisionOrVersion: Report No. OT-252-RRD-036; Revision 1; Revision of OT-251-RRD-028

sourceSummary.oneLine: ONETECH test report for G1717CW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector IP6X and IPX8 testing under IEC 60529.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as supporting performance test evidence for the submitted G1717CW sample; the report states it is not valid for whole product quality and is not related to KS Q ISO/IEC 17025 or KOLAS accreditation.
keyPoints: Report No. OT-252-RRD-036 was issued on 2025. 2. 19. as Revision 1 of OT-251-RRD-028.
The EUT was a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, Type/model G1717CW, sample quantity 1 EA.
The applied standard was IEC 60529:1989 + A1:1999 + A2:2013.
IP6X access-to-hazardous-parts testing found no pass of probe within the enclosure.
IP6X solid foreign objects testing found no traces of dust deposits within the enclosure.
IPX8 water protection testing found no water deposits within the enclosure after 60 min immersion condition.

evidence.claim: The EUT was a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector model G1717CW.

evidence.claim: The test method used was IEC 60529:1989 + A1:1999 + A2:2013.

evidence.claim: The IP6X hazardous parts access test was performed on 2025. 1. 8.
evidence.evidenceText: Test for protection against access to hazardous parts (IP6X) Date: 2025. 1. 8.
evidence.pageTarget: IP6X Protection Against Access to Hazardous Parts

evidence.claim: The IP6X hazardous parts access test found no pass of probe within the enclosure.
evidence.evidenceText: No pass of probe were found at any point within the enclosure
evidence.pageTarget: IP6X Protection Against Access to Hazardous Parts

evidence.claim: The IP6X solid foreign objects test was performed on 2025. 1. 8.
evidence.evidenceText: Test for protection against solid foreign objects (IP6X) Date: 2025. 1. 8.

evidence.claim: The IP6X solid foreign objects test found no traces of dust deposits within the enclosure.
evidence.evidenceText: No traces of dust deposits were found at any point within the enclosure

evidence.claim: The IPX8 water protection test was performed on 2025. 1. 6.
evidence.evidenceText: Test for protection against water (IPX8) Date: 2025. 1. 6.

evidence.claim: The IPX8 water protection test condition was 1 m water level above bottom for 60 min.
evidence.evidenceText: Immersion tank Water-lever on enclosure: 1 m above bottom; The duration of the test: 60 min

evidence.claim: The IPX8 water protection test found no water deposits within the enclosure.
evidence.evidenceText: No Water deposits were found at any point within the enclosure

evidence.claim: The report states it is not related to KS Q ISO/IEC 17025 and Korea Laboratory Accreditation scheme accreditation.

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal indicates MFDS/domestic, but the source text does not identify MFDS or a regulatory authority; authorityOrJurisdiction is left empty.
